title: Progress Test
objectives: Assess cultural and traditions vocabulary from Unit 7
Test reading comprehension about a trip to Bahrain
Evaluate grammar: past continuous with while and imperatives
Assess spelling: -er/-est rules and cultural vocabulary
Write a structured paragraph about a holiday in Qatar

exercises.problem: The students listened to the teacher's instructions ............ (a. tightly, b. respectfully, c. suddenly, d. loudly)
My sister buys a piece of silver ............ from the market. (a. jewellery, b. destination, c. agency, d. librarian)
He ............ the ball quickly in the game. (a. replied, b. picked, c. landed, d. announced)
We use the internet to attend online ............ classes. (a. virtual, b. tropical, c. monsoon, d. nervous)
Read about trip to Bahrain. Best title: (a. A Day at the Beach, b. A Trip to Bahrain, c. A Visit to the Desert, d. A Holiday in Kuwait)
The opposite of 'oldest' in line 4: (a. newest, b. quietest, c. biggest, d. clearest)
The underlined word 'It' in line 7 refers to: (a. Bahrain Fort, b. Manama Souq, c. National Museum, d. Pearl Diving)
While my father ............ planting, my mother gave him the gloves. (a. has, b. was, c. is)
While they were ............ board game, their friend felt hungry. (a. played, b. plays, c. playing)
Don't ............ to do your homework. (a. forget, b. forgot, c. forgotten)
If you want to get to the market, ............ left then walk straight. (a. turned, b. turn, c. turning)
1. I have gold ............ 2. They like ............ food.
Graphic organiser about 'A Holiday in Qatar': 1. Where? 2. How? 3. Who with? 4. What did you do? 5. How was the weather? Guide words: plane-family-visited-cultural places-enjoyed-cool
exercises.answer: Last holiday, I went to Qatar. We went by plane. I went with my family. We visited cultural places and enjoyed the sights. The weather was cool. It was a great holiday.

teaching_notes: Reading about Bahrain tests cultural knowledge — Bahrain Fort, National Museum, Manama Souq, pearl diving heritage. Grammar tests both past continuous with while and imperatives (including negative). The Qatar writing task connects to Gulf cultural awareness.
